name: Waterboy
description:
Weirdest Powers, weirdest fella...

You take the bus today. You gotta get to an important meeting (or event). You are at the bus stop. It’s raining quite a lot...Then you see him! Waterboy! The...ahem...Water Hero. Welp, even though you could not meet a famous hero or a good one, you got to meet an attractive and nerdy one..
creator: MoonRabbitCookie
